duplicate_primary_key.label: Deduplicate Rows
duplicate_primary_key.description: Remove duplicate rows based on the primary key column to ensure data integrity.

duplicate_primary_key.label: Flag Duplicate Rows
duplicate_primary_key.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag duplicate rows for further review before deletion.

invalid_lookup_value.label: Flag Invalid Email Addresses
invalid_lookup_value.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag email addresses that are not in the allowed lookup list, allowing for manual review.

invalid_lookup_value.label: Exclude Invalid Email Addresses from Output
invalid_lookup_value.description: Exclude the email column from the output to prevent invalid values from affecting downstream processes.

custom_rule_violation.label: Flag Outliers for Email Domain
custom_rule_violation.description: Add a boolean audit column to flag email addresses that do not end with @capgemini.com, allowing for manual review.

custom_rule_violation.label: Exclude Email Column from Output
custom_rule_violation.description: Exclude the email column from the output dataset to prevent the use of invalid email addresses.
